description: Named presets for the live integration test runner. Resolved by test-set-registry.mts when --set <name> is passed to live-test-runner.mts. Each preset is a filter; the runner takes the union of `tags`/`regex` results and subtracts `excludeTags`/`excludeRegex`. Scenarios with `untestable: <reason>` are excluded from every preset unless --include-untestable is passed.

essentials.description: Full feature coverage matrix (1 representative per supported base × addon-combo × task cell).

ci-pr.description: Minimum set for pull-request feedback: OIDC + base-default representatives plus declared-quick scenarios. Excludes external-dependency tests so unconfigured environments still pass.

nightly.description: Full suite minus production-prefixed and untestable scenarios. Default for the scheduled workflow.

production.description: Production validation scenarios only (filename pattern `production-*`). Run manually.

smoke.description: Smallest sanity check: quick scenarios with no addons. Useful for local sanity-checking.

local-dev.description: Developer-friendly default: quick scenarios that don't require external services.
